faq.q: How many GCC centers does Apptio operate in India?
faq.a: Apptio operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apptio have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Apptio's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Apptio run in India?
faq.a: Apptio runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apptio's India GCCs?
faq.a: Apptio's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apptio's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Apptio's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
